name: rccs-cloud
description: Interact with the RIKEN R-CCS Cloud: submit and monitor Slurm jobs across heterogeneous hardware (CPU, NVIDIA/AMD/Intel GPU), manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in R-CCS Cloud documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor R-CCS Cloud Slurm jobs and search R-CCS Cloud docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the RIKEN R-CCS Cloud from Codex: submit and monitor Slurm jobs on heterogeneous hardware (A64FX, x86_64, NVIDIA/AMD/Intel GPU), manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in documentation guide.
defaultPrompt: Submit a test CPU job on genoa.
What partitions are available and what modules do they need?
